personal.name: Desai Vanrajsinh
personal.summary: AI/ML Engineer specializing in agentic systems, RAG pipelines,Fine tuning on custom data and production-grade LLM applications. IBM Professional Data Science Certification holder with hands-on experience building multimodal rag chatbots, LangGraph-based agentic ticket resolution system, and transformer models from scratch,serving ~10K requests/day with 95%+ classification accuracy.

education.institution: LJ Institute of Engineering and Technology
education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering

responsibilities: Built an end-to-end RAG-based multimodal chatbot (text + image) using LLMs, supporting freemium access, trained over 10000+ documents, achieving high response accuracy and strong contextual retrieval performance.

Selected through client interview and worked on-site in Bangalore to develop a LangGraph-based agentic chatbot for agentic ticket resolution system, integrating a custom-trained ModernBert classification model, serving ~10K requests/day with 95%+ classification accuracy.

Currently designing and implementing an agent-based issue resolution system, where specialized agents autonomously analyze, route, and resolve classified tickets, reducing manual intervention and improving resolution efficiency.

Implemented Cooperative SQL Generation (CSMA-SQL) using multi-functional LLM agents, enabling accurate SQL generation over large, segmented enterprise databases whose schemas exceed single-context LLM limits.
achievements: Achieved 95%+ ticket classification accuracy at ~10K requests/day in production environment daily used by 12k employees
Indexed and retrieved knowledge from 10000+ documents with high contextual grounding
IBM Professional Data Science Certification holder
On-site client engagement in Bangalore for enterprise AI delivery

projects.title: Agentic Ticket Classification & Resolution System
projects.description: LangGraph-based agentic chatbot for automatic ticket classification and resolution with custom-trained ModernBert model and autonomous issue resolution agents.
features: LangGraph-based agentic workflow for ticket automation
Agent-based issue resolution with autonomous routing and agentic resolution
Reduce 50% workforce from the support team

projects.title: Enterprise Multimodal RAG Platform with Hybrid Retrieval & Guardrails
projects.description: Built a production-ready enterprise AI platform leveraging Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with hybrid search, custom web retrieval, guardrails, observability, and cost-optimized inference. The system supports text, image, and document understanding while delivering grounded, secure, and scalable responses across internal and external knowledge sources
features: Hybrid search with BM25 and dense embeddings
Optimized chunking, embeddings, and prompt strategies

projects.title: Large Language Model From Scratch
projects.description: GPT-style Transformer language model implemented from scratch in PyTorch with ~124M parameters, exported to ONNX for optimized inference.
features: Self-attention, embeddings, causal masking, feed-forward layers

projects.title: Cooperative SQL Generation (CSMA-SQL)
projects.description: Multi-functional LLM agent system for accurate SQL generation over large, segmented enterprise databases exceeding single-context LLM limits.
features: Schema segmentation for large enterprise databases
Context-aware query planning across database segments

certifications.name: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
certifications.description: Comprehensive training in Python, SQL, data analysis, machine learning, visualization, and generative AI, including hands-on projects and a capstone focused on real-world data science workflows.

certifications.name: Mathematics for Machine Learning & Data Science Specialization
certifications.description: Strong foundation in linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics, with emphasis on mathematical concepts essential for machine learning and deep learning models.

certifications.name: IBM DevOps and Software Engineering Professional Certificate
certifications.description: Comprehensive training in DevOps, Software Engineering, Agile, Scrum, Cloud Computing, Git/GitHub, Linux, Python, Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, Microservices, Serverless Architectures, CI/CD, Application Security, Monitoring, and Observability, reinforced through hands-on labs and a real-world DevOps capstone project.
